# kSecClassKey

**Global Variable**

The value that indicates a cryptographic key item.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecClassKey: CFString
```

## Discussion

The following keychain item attributes form the composite primary key of a cryptographic key item:

- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccessGroup] (on macOS, this key only applies if you set [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecUseDataProtectionKeychain] or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrSynchronizable] to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true])
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrApplicationLabel]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrApplicationTag]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrEffectiveKeySize]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrKeyClass]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrKeySizeInBits]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrKeyType]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrSynchronizable] (on iOS 14 and newer, iOS 11 newer, and watchOS 7 and newer)

Calls to [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemAdd(_:_:)] that add a cryptographic key item with the same values for all of these attributes as an existing item result in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/errSecDuplicateItem].

The following keychain item attributes apply to a cryptographic key item, and don’t form part of its composite primary key:

- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccess] (macOS only)
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccessible] (on macOS, this key only applies if you set [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecUseDataProtectionKeychain] or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrSynchronizable] to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true])
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrLabel]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrIsPermanent]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrPRF]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrSalt]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrRounds]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCanEncrypt]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCanDecrypt]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCanDerive]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCanSign]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCanVerify]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCanWrap]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCanUnwrap]
